creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Hi there

1) Why do you switch out USES=gmake by USE_GMAKE=yes?
2) The header of the Makefile should only contain the $FreeBSD$ one, the rest is not current style. See the note to 3.1 in [1]
3) Use portlint and try to make it happy :)


[1] https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/quick-porting.html#porting-makefile
